travel_105.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ آيِبُونَ تَابِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ صَدَقَ اللَّهُ وَعْدَهُ وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ وَهَزَمَ الْأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ
travel_105.tr: Allaahu 'Akbar, Allaahu 'Akbar, Allaahu 'Akbar. Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku, wa lahul-hamdu, wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer. 'Aa'iboona, taa'iboona, 'aabidoona, lirabbinaa haamidoona, sadaqallaahu wa'dahu, wa nasara 'abdahu, wa hazamal-'ahzaaba wahdahu.
travel_105.en: Allah is the Most Great (three times). None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is Able to do all things. We return repentant to our Lord, worshiping our Lord, and praising our Lord. He fulfilled His Promise, He aided His slave, and He alone defeated the Confederates.

praise_26.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
praise_26.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'astakheeruka bi'ilmika, wa 'astaqdiruka biqudratika, wa 'as'aluka min fadhlikal-'Adheemi, fa'innaka taqdiru wa laa 'aqdiru, wa ta'lamu wa laa 'a'lamu, wa 'Anta 'Allaamul-Ghuyoobi. Allaahumma 'in kunta ta'lamu 'anna haathal-'amra (mention the matter) khayrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati 'amree, faqdurhu lee wa yassirhu lee thumma baarik lee feehi. Wa 'in kunta ta'lamu 'anna haathal-'amra sharrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati 'amree, fasrifhu 'annee wasrifnee 'anhu waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kaana thumma 'ardhinee bihi.
praise_26.en: O Allah, I seek the counsel of Your Knowledge, and I seek the help of Your Omnipotence, and I beseech You for Your Magnificent Grace. Surely, You are Capable and I am not. You know and I know not, and You are the Knower of the unseen. O Allah, if You know that this matter — (mention the matter) — is good for me in my religion and in my life and for my welfare in the life to come, then ordain it for me and make it easy for me, then bless me in it. And if You know that this matter is bad for me in my religion and in my life and for my welfare in the life to come, then distance it from me, and distance me from it, and ordain for me what is good wherever it may be, and help me to be content with it.

praise_43.ar: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
praise_43.tr: Allaahumma laa sahla 'illaa maa ja'altahu sahlan wa 'Anta taj'alul-hazna 'ithaa shi'ta sahlan.
praise_43.en: O Allah, there is no ease other than what You make easy. If You please, You ease sorrow.

praise_44.en: There is not any slave of Allah who commits a sin, then he perfects his ablution and stands to pray two rak'ah of prayer, then seeks Allah's forgiveness, except that Allah will forgive him.

praise_46.en: It is the Decree of Allah and He does whatever He wills. The strong believer is better and more dear to Allah than the weak believer, and in each of them there is good. Be vigilant for what is to your benefit and seek the help of Allah and do not falter. But when you are stricken by some setback, do not say: 'If only I had done such and such…' — rather say: 'It is the Decree of Allah and He does whatever He wills.' For verily the saying 'if...' begins the work of the Devil.

praise_88.en: Whoever memorizes ten verses from the beginning of Surah Al-Kahf will be protected from the False Messiah (Dajjal). If he recites them in every prayer after the final Tashahhud before ending the prayer, seeking the protection of Allah from the trials of the False Messiah.

praise_107.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: Whoever prays for Allah's blessings upon me once, will be blessed for it by Allah ten times.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: Do not make my grave a place of ritual celebration, but pray for Allah's blessings upon me, for your blessings reach me from wherever you are.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: The miser is the one in whose presence I am mentioned yet does not pray for Allah's blessings upon me.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: Indeed Allah has angels who roam the earth and they convey to me the greetings of my Ummah.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: No one sends greetings upon me but Allah returns my soul to me so that I may return his greetings.

praise_129.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: By Allah, I seek the forgiveness of Allah, and repent to Him more than seventy times in a day.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: O people, repent to Allah, for I verily repent to Him one hundred times a day.

praise_129.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
praise_129.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, Whom there is none worthy of worship except Him, the Living, the Eternal, and I repent to Him. (Allah will forgive him even if he has deserted the army's ranks.)
The Prophet  ﷺ said: The closest that the Lord comes to the slave is in the last portion of the night. So if you are able to be among those who remember Allah in this hour, then be among them.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: The closest that the slave comes to his Lord is when he is prostrating, so invoke Allah much in prostration.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: Verily my heart becomes preoccupied, and verily I seek Allah's forgiveness a hundred times a day.

praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: Whoever says 'Glorified is Allah and praised is He' one hundred times a day, will have his sins forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea.

praise_130.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
praise_130.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer.
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: Whoever says this ten times, will have the reward for freeing four slaves from the Children of Isma'il.

praise_130.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: Two words are light on the tongue, weigh heavily in the balance, and are loved by the Most Merciful: Glorified is Allah and praised is He, Glorified is Allah the Most Great.

praise_130.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
praise_130.tr: Subhaanallaahi, walhamdu lillaahi, wa laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu, wallaahu 'Akbar.
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: For me to say Glory is to Allah, and praise is to Allah, and there is none worthy of worship but Allah, and Allah is the Most Great is dearer to me than all that the sun rises upon.

The Prophet  ﷺ said: Is anyone of you incapable of earning one thousand Hasanah (rewards) in a day? Glorify Allah a hundred times and a thousand Hasanah will be written for you, or a thousand sins will be wiped away.
The Prophet  ﷺ said: Glorified is Allah the Most Great and praised is He — will have a date palm planted for him in Paradise.

praise_130.ar: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
praise_130.tr: Laa hawla wa laa quwwata 'illaa billaah.
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: O Abdullah bin Qais, should I not point you to one of the treasures of Paradise? Say: There is no power and no might except by Allah.

praise_130.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
praise_130.tr: Subhaanallaah, Walhamdu lillaah, Wa laa 'ilaaha 'illallaah, Wallaahu 'Akbar.
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: The most beloved words to Allah are four: Glorified is Allah, The praise is for Allah, There is none worthy of worship but Allah, Allah is the Most Great.

praise_130.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ — اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
praise_130.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, Allaahu 'Akbaru kabeeran, walhamdu lillaahi katheeran, Subhaanallaahi Rabbil-'aalameen, laa hawla wa laa quwwata 'illaa billaahil-'Azeezil-Hakeem. — Allaahummaghfir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, warzuqnee.
praise_130.en: A man asked the Prophet  ﷺ: Teach me a word that I can say. He said: Say — None has the right to be worshiped but Allah, Who has no partner, Allah is the Great the Most Great, and praise is to Allah in abundance, glory is to Allah, Lord of the worlds, there is no power and no might but by Allah the Mighty, the Wise. The man asked: That is for my Lord, but what about me? The Prophet  ﷺ said: Then say: O Allah forgive me, and have mercy on me and guide me, and provide for me.

praise_130.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
praise_130.tr: Allaahummaghfir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wa 'aafinee warzuqnee.
praise_130.en: O Allah forgive me, and have mercy on me and guide me and give me good health and provide for me.

praise_130.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ — لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
praise_130.en: The Prophet  ﷺ said: The most excellent invocation is: Praise is for Allah, and: There is none worthy of worship but Allah.

praise_130.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
praise_130.tr: Subhaanallaah, Walhamdu lillaah, Wa laa 'ilaaha 'illallaah, Wallaahu 'Akbar, Wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata 'illaa billaah.
praise_130.en: The good deeds which endure are: Glorified is Allah, The praise is for Allah, There is none worthy of worship but Allah, Allah is the Most Great, and There is no power and no might except by Allah.

praise_131.en: Abdullah ibn Amr said: I saw the Prophet  ﷺ counting the glorification of his Lord on his right hand.

hajj_115.ar: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
hajj_115.tr: Labbayk Allaahumma labbayk, labbayk laa shareeka laka labbayk, 'innal-hamda, wanni'mata, laka walmulk, laa shareeka laka.
hajj_115.en: I am here at Your service, O Allah, I am here at Your service. I am here at Your service, You have no partner, I am here at Your service. Surely the praise, and blessings are Yours, and the dominion. You have no partner.

hajj_116.en: Allah is the Most Great. The Prophet (pbuh) performed Tawaf riding a camel. Every time he passed the corner containing the Black Stone, he would point to it and say: Allah is the Most Great.

hajj_117.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
hajj_117.tr: Rabbanaa 'aatinaa fid-dunyaa hasanatan wa fil-'aakhirati hasanatan wa qinaa 'athaaban-naar.
hajj_117.en: Our Lord, grant us the good things in this world and the good things in the next life and save us from the punishment of the Fire. (Recited between the Yemeni corner and the Black Stone.)

hajj_118.ar: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ — أَبْدَأُ بِمَا بَدَأَ اللَّهُ بِهِ — اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ — لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ أَنْجَزَ وَعْدَهُ وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ وَهَزَمَ الْأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ
hajj_118.tr: 'Innas-Safaa wal-Marwata min sha'aa'irillaah. 'Abda'u bimaa bada'allaahu bihi. Allaahu 'Akbar (three times). Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer, laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu, 'anjaza wa'dahu, wa nasara 'abdahu, wa hazamal-'ahzaaba wahdahu.
hajj_118.en: Upon approaching Mount Safa, recite: Surely Safa and Marwah are among the signs of Allah. I begin by that which Allah began. Then climb Safa, face the Qiblah and say Allahu Akbar three times. Then say: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is Able to do all things. None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone — He fulfilled His Promise, He aided His slave, and He alone defeated the Confederates. Then supplicate for what you wish, and repeat this three times. Do the same at Mount Marwah.

hajj_119.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
hajj_119.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer.
hajj_119.en: The best invocation is that of the Day of Arafah, and the best that anyone can say is what I and the Prophets before me have said: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is Able to do all things.

hajj_120.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ — لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ — اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
hajj_120.en: At Al-Mash'aril-Haraam (Muzdalifa), the Prophet (pbuh) faced the Qiblah, invoked Allah and repeatedly said: Allah is the Most Great, There is none worthy of worship but Allah, and Allah is One. He remained stationary until the sky became yellow with the dawn, then pressed on before sunrise.

hajj_121.en: Say Allahu Akbar with each pebble thrown at the three pillars (Jamarat). After stoning the first and second pillar, go forward, face the Qiblah, raise your hands and supplicate. After the third pillar, say Allahu Akbar with each pebble but leave without standing for supplications.

hajj_127.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَلَكَ اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي
hajj_127.tr: Bismillaahi wallaahu 'Akbar, Allaahumma minka wa laka, Allaahumma taqabbal minnee.
hajj_127.en: With the Name of Allah, Allah is the Most Great. O Allah, from You and to You. O Allah, accept it from me.

prayer_8.src: Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, Ahmad, Irwa'ul-Ghalil 1/122

prayer_9.ar: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
prayer_9.tr: 'Ash-hadu 'an laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu wa 'ash-hadu 'anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa Rasooluhu.
prayer_9.en: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner; and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger.

prayer_9.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
prayer_9.en: O Allah, make me among those who turn to You in repentance, and make me among those who are purified.

prayer_9.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
prayer_9.tr: Subhaanaka Allaahumma wa bihamdika, 'ash-hadu 'an laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta, 'astaghfiruka wa 'atoobu 'ilayk.
prayer_9.en: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise. I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship but You. I seek Your forgiveness and turn to You in repentance.

prayer_12.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا وَمِنْ فَوْقِي نُورًا وَمِنْ تَحْتِي نُورًا وَعَنْ يَمِينِي نُورًا وَعَنْ شِمَالِي نُورًا وَمِنْ أَمَامِي نُورًا وَمِنْ خَلْفِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْ فِي نَفْسِي نُورًا وَأَعْظِمْ لِي نُورًا وَعَظِّمْ لِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْ لِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْنِي نُورًا اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِنِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْ فِي عَصَبِي نُورًا وَفِي لَحْمِي نُورًا وَفِي دَمِي نُورًا وَفِي شَعْرِي نُورًا وَفِي بَشَرِي نُورًا اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي نُورًا فِي قَبْرِي وَنُورًا فِي عِظَامِي وَزِدْنِي نُورًا وَزِدْنِي نُورًا وَزِدْنِي نُورًا وَهَبْ لِي نُورًا عَلَى نُورٍ
prayer_12.tr: Allaahummaj'al fee qalbee nooran, wa fee lisaanee nooran, wa fee sam'ee nooran, wa fee basaree nooran, wa min fawqee nooran, wa min tahtee nooran, wa 'an yameenee nooran, wa 'an shimaalee nooran, wa min 'amaamee nooran, wa min khalfee nooran, waj'al fee nafsee nooran, wa 'a'dhim lee nooran, wa 'adhdhim lee nooran, waj'al lee nooran, waj'alnee nooran. Allaahumma 'a'tinee nooran, waj'al fee 'asabee nooran, wa fee lahmee nooran, wa fee damee nooran, wa fee sha'ree nooran, wa fee basharee nooran. Allaahummaj'al lee nooran fee qabree wa nooran fee 'idhaamee. Wa zidnee nooran, wa zidnee nooran, wa zidnee nooran. Wa hab lee nooran 'alaa noor.
prayer_12.en: O Allah, place light in my heart, and on my tongue light, and in my ears light and in my sight light, and above me light, and below me light, and to my right light, and to my left light, and before me light and behind me light. Place in my soul light. Magnify for me light, and amplify for me light. Make for me light and make me a light. O Allah, grant me light, and place light in my nerves, and in my body light and in my blood light and in my hair light and in my skin light. O Allah, make for me a light in my grave and a light in my bones. Increase me in light, increase me in light, increase me in light. Grant me light upon light.

prayer_13.ar: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ وَسُلْطَانِهِ الْقَدِيمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
prayer_13.tr: 'A'oothu billaahil-'Adheem, wa bi-Wajhihil-Kareem, wa Sultaanihil-qadeem, minash-Shaytaanir-rajeem. Bismillaahi, wassalaatu wassalaamu 'alaa Rasoolillaahi. Allaahum-maftah lee 'abwaaba rahmatika.
prayer_13.en: I seek refuge in Almighty Allah, by His Noble Face, by His primordial power, from Satan the outcast. In the Name of Allah, and blessings and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, open before me the doors of Your mercy.

prayer_14.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ اللَّهُمَّ اعْصِمْنِي مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
prayer_14.tr: Bismillaahi wassalaatu wassalaamu 'alaa Rasoolillaahi, Allaahumma 'innee 'as'aluka min fadhlika, Allaahumma'simnee minash-Shaytaanir-rajeem.
prayer_14.en: In the Name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, I ask for Your favor. O Allah, protect me from Satan the outcast.

prayer_15.ar: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
prayer_15.tr: Laa hawla wa laa quwwata 'illaa billaah.
prayer_15.en: Repeat what the muazzin says, except for 'Hayya alas-Salaah' and 'Hayya alal-Falaah' where you say: There is no might and no power except by Allah.

prayer_15.ar: وَأَنَا أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولًا وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا
prayer_15.tr: Wa 'anaa 'ash-hadu 'an laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu wa 'anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa Rasooluhu, radheetu billaahi Rabban, wa bi-Muhammadin Rasoolan wa bil'islaami deenan.
prayer_15.en: After the Shahadah in the Athan say: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner, and that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger. I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Muhammad as my Messenger and with Islam as my religion.

prayer_15.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
prayer_15.tr: Allaahumma salli 'alaa Muhammadin wa aali Muhammad.
prayer_15.en: Then send prayers upon the Prophet (pbuh) after answering the call of the muazzin.

prayer_15.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ إِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ
prayer_15.tr: Allaahumma Rabba haathihid-da'watit-taammati wassalaatil-qaa'imati, 'aati Muhammadanil-waseelata walfadheelata, wab'ath-hu maqaamam-mahmoodanil-lathee wa'adtahu, 'innaka laa tukhliful-mee'aad.
prayer_15.en: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer. Grant Muhammad the intercession and favor, and raise him to the honored station You have promised him. Verily You do not break promises.
Supplicate for yourself between the Athan and the Iqamah, as supplication at such time is not rejected.

prayer_16.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ اللَّهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِالثَّلْجِ وَالْمَاءِ وَالْبَرَدِ
prayer_16.tr: Allaahumma baa'id baynee wa bayna khataayaaya kamaa baa'adta baynal-mashriqi walmaghribi, Allaahumma naqqinee min khataayaaya kamaa yunaqqath-thawbul-'abyadhu minad-danasi, Allaahum-maghsilnee min khataayaaya bith-thalji walmaa'i walbarad.
prayer_16.en: O Allah, separate me from my sins as You have separated the East from the West. O Allah, cleanse me of my transgressions as the white garment is cleansed of stains. O Allah, wash away my sins with ice and water and frost.

prayer_16.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
prayer_16.tr: Subhaanaka Allaahumma wa bihamdika, wa tabaarakasmuka, wa ta'aalaa jadduka, wa laa 'ilaaha ghayruka.
prayer_16.en: Glory is to You O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your Name and Exalted is Your Majesty. There is none worthy of worship but You.
prayer_16.src: Abu Dawud, At-Tirmizi, Sahih At-Tirmizi 1/77, Sahih Ibn Majah 1/135

prayer_16.ar: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ حَنِيفًا وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ إِنَّ صَلَاتِي وَنُسُكِي وَمَحْيَايَ وَمَمَاتِي لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَبِذَلِكَ أُمِرْتُ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْمَلِكُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
prayer_16.tr: Wajjahtu wajhiya lillathee fataras-samaawaati wal-ardha haneefan wa maa anaa minal-mushrikeen. Inna salaatee wa nusukee wa mahyaaya wa mamaatee lillaahi Rabbil-'aalameen, laa shareeka lahu wa bithalika 'umirtu wa 'anaa minal-muslimeen. Allaahumma 'Antal-Maliku laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta.
prayer_16.en: I have turned my face sincerely towards He Who brought forth the heavens and the earth, and I am not of those who associate others with Allah. Indeed my prayer, my sacrifice, my life and my death are for Allah, Lord of the worlds. No partner has He, with this I am commanded and I am of the Muslims. O Allah, You are the Sovereign, none has the right to be worshiped except You.

prayer_16.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرَائِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ اهْدِنِي لِمَا اخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
prayer_16.tr: Allaahumma Rabba Jibraa'eela wa Meekaa'eela wa 'Israafeel, faatiras-samaawaati wal'ardhi, 'Aalimal-ghaybi wash-shahaadati, 'Anta tahkumu bayna 'ibaadika feemaa kaanoo feehi yakhtalifoon. Ihdinee limakhtulifafeehi minal-haqqi bi'ithnika, 'innaka tahdee man tashaa'u 'ilaa siraatim-mustaqeem.
prayer_16.en: O Allah, Lord of Jibraeel, Meekaaeel and Israfeel, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the seen and the unseen. You are the arbitrator between Your servants in that which they have disputed. Guide me to the truth by Your leave, for verily You guide whom You will to a straight path.

prayer_16.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا وَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا — أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ مِنْ نَفْخِهِ وَنَفْثِهِ وَهَمْزِهِ
prayer_16.tr: Allaahu 'Akbar Kabeera (3x), walhamdu lillaahi katheera (3x), wa Subhaanallaahi bukratan wa'aseela. — 'A'oothu billaahi minash-Shaytaan: min nafkhihi, wa nafthihi, wa hamzihi.
prayer_16.en: Allah is the Greatest, Most Great (three times). Praise is to Allah, abundantly (three times). Glory is to Allah, at the break of day and at its end. Then: I seek refuge in Allah from Satan — from his breath, his voice, and his whisper.
prayer_16.src: Abu Dawud 1/203, Ibn Majah 1/265, Ahmad 4/85, Muslim 1/420

prayer_16.ar: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ نُورُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ الْحَقُّ وَوَعْدُكَ الْحَقُّ وَالْجَنَّةُ حَقٌّ وَالنَّارُ حَقٌّ وَالنَّبِيُّونَ حَقٌّ وَمُحَمَّدٌ حَقٌّ وَالسَّاعَةُ حَقٌّ اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ وَعَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْتُ وَبِكَ خَاصَمْتُ وَإِلَيْكَ حَاكَمْتُ فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
prayer_16.tr: Allaahumma lakal-hamdu 'Anta noorusamaawaati wal'ardhi wa man feehinna. Wa lakal-hamdu 'Antal-haqq. Wa wa'dukal-haqq, waljannatu haqq, wannaaru haqq, wannabiyyoona haqq, wa Muhammadun haqq, wassaa'atu haqq. Allaahumma laka 'aslamtu, wa 'alayka tawakkaltu, wa bika 'aamantu, wa 'ilayka 'anabtu, wa bika khaasamtu, wa 'ilayka haakamtu. Faghfir lee maa qaddamtu wa maa 'akhkhartu. Laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta.
prayer_16.en: O Allah, praise is to You — You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and all they contain. Praise is to You, You are the Truth, Your Promise is true, Paradise is true, Hell is true, the Prophets are true, Muhammad (pbuh) is true, and the Hour of Judgment is true. O Allah, to You I have submitted, upon You I depend, in You I believe, to You I turn, for Your sake I dispute, and by Your standard I judge. Forgive me what I have sent before and what I have left behind. There is none worthy of worship but You.

prayer_17.en: Glory to my Lord the Exalted. (Three times)
prayer_17.src: Abu Dawud, An-Nasa'i, At-Tirmizi, Sahih At-Tirmizi 1/83

prayer_17.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
prayer_17.tr: Subhaanaka Allaahumma Rabbanaa wa bihamdika Allaahum-maghfir lee.
prayer_17.en: Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours. O Allah, forgive me.
Glory (to You), Most Holy (are You), Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

prayer_17.ar: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ رَكَعْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ خَشَعَ لَكَ سَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي وَمُخِّي وَعَظْمِي وَعَصَبِي وَمَا اسْتَقَلَّ بِهِ قَدَمِي
prayer_17.tr: Allaahumma laka raka'tu, wa bika 'aamantu, wa laka 'aslamtu. Khasha'a laka sam'ee, wa basaree, wa mukhkhee, wa 'adhmee, wa 'asabee, wa mastaqalla bihi qadamee.
prayer_17.en: O Allah, to You I bow and in You I believe and to You I have submitted. Before You my hearing is humbled, as is my sight, my mind, my bones, my nerves and what my feet have mounted upon.

prayer_17.ar: سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْجَبَرُوتِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ وَالْكِبْرِيَاءِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ
prayer_17.en: Glory is to You, Master of power, of dominion, of majesty and greatness.

prayer_18.en: Allah hears whoever praises Him. (Said by the imam and the one praying alone when rising from Ruku)

prayer_18.ar: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ
prayer_18.tr: Rabbanaa wa lakal-hamd, hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubaarakan feeh.
prayer_18.en: Our Lord, praise is Yours, abundant, good and blessed praise.

prayer_18.ar: مِلْءَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمِلْءَ الْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا أَهْلَ الثَّنَاءِ وَالْمَجْدِ أَحَقُّ مَا قَالَ الْعَبْدُ وَكُلُّنَا لَكَ عَبْدٌ اللَّهُمَّ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَلَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَلَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ
prayer_18.tr: Mil'as-samaawaati wa mil'al-'ardhi wa maa baynahumaa. 'Ahlath-thanaa'i walmajdi, 'ahaqqu maa qaalal-'abdu, wa kullunaa laka 'abdun. Allaahumma laa maani'a limaa 'a'tayta, wa laa mu'tiya limaa mana'ta, wa laa yanfa'u thal-jaddi minkal-jadd.
prayer_18.en: A praise that fills the heavens and the earth and what is between them. You Allah are most worthy of praise and majesty, and what the slave has said — we are all Your slaves. O Allah, there is none who can withhold what You give, and none may give what You have withheld. And the might of the mighty person cannot benefit him against You.

prayer_19.en: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High. (Three times)
prayer_19.src: Abu Dawud, An-Nasa'i, At-Tirmizi, Sahih At-Tirmizi 1/83

prayer_19.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
prayer_19.tr: Subhaanaka Allaahumma Rabbanaa wa bihamdika Allaahum-maghfir lee.
prayer_19.en: Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours. O Allah, forgive me.
Glory (to You), Most Holy (are You), Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

prayer_19.ar: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ وَصَوَّرَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ تَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ
prayer_19.tr: Allaahumma laka sajadtu wa bika 'aamantu, wa laka 'aslamtu, sajada wajhiya lillathee khalaqahu, wa sawwarahu, wa shaqqa sam'ahu wa basarahu, tabaarakallaahu 'ahsanul-khaaliqeen.
prayer_19.en: O Allah, to You I prostrate myself and in You I believe. To You I have submitted. My face is prostrated to the One Who created it, fashioned it, and gave it hearing and sight. Blessed is Allah, the Best of creators.

prayer_19.ar: سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْجَبَرُوتِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ وَالْكِبْرِيَاءِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ
prayer_19.en: Glory is to You, Master of power, of dominion, of majesty and greatness.

prayer_19.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
prayer_19.tr: Allaahum-maghfir lee thanbee kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa 'awwalahu wa 'aakhirahu wa 'alaaniyatahu wa sirrahu.
prayer_19.en: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, great and small, the first and the last, those that are apparent and those that are hidden.

prayer_19.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ لَا أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ
prayer_19.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu biridhaaka min sakhatika, wa bimu'aafaatika min 'uqoobatika, wa 'a'oothu bika minka, laa 'uhsee thanaa'an 'alayka 'Anta kamaa 'athnayta 'alaa nafsika.
prayer_19.en: O Allah, I seek protection in Your pleasure from Your anger, and I seek protection in Your forgiveness from Your punishment. I seek protection in You from You. I cannot count Your praises. You are as You have praised Yourself.

prayer_20.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
prayer_20.en: Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

prayer_20.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَاجْبُرْنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي وَارْفَعْنِي
prayer_20.tr: Allaahum-maghfir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wajburnee, wa 'aafinee, warzuqnee, warta'nee.
prayer_20.en: O Allah forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, support me, protect me, provide for me and elevate me.

prayer_21.ar: سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ بِحَوْلِهِ وَقُوَّتِهِ فَتَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ
prayer_21.tr: Sajada wajhiya lillathee khalaqahu, wa shaqqa sam'ahu wa basarahu bihawlihi wa quwwatihi. Fatabaarakallaahu 'ahsanul-khaaliqeen.
prayer_21.en: I have prostrated my face to the One Who created it, and gave it hearing and sight by His might and His power. Glory is to Allah, the Best of creators.

prayer_21.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اكْتُبْ لِي بِهَا عِنْدَكَ أَجْرًا وَضَعْ عَنِّي بِهَا وِزْرًا وَاجْعَلْهَا لِي عِنْدَكَ ذُخْرًا وَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُودَ
prayer_21.tr: Allaahum-maktub lee bihaa 'indaka 'ajran, wa dha' 'annee bihaa wizran, wajalhaa lee 'indaka thukhran, wa taqabbalhaa minnee kamaa taqabbaltahaa min 'abdika Daawooda.
prayer_21.en: O Allah, write it as a reward for me, release me from a burden for it, make it a treasure for me in Paradise, and accept it from me as You accepted it from Your servant Dawud.

prayer_22.ar: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
prayer_22.tr: Attahiyyaatu lillaahi wassalawaatu, wattayyibaatu, assalaamu 'alayka 'ayyuhan-Nabiyyu wa rahmatullaahi wa barakaatuhu, assalaamu 'alaynaa wa 'alaa 'ibaadillaahis-saaliheen. 'Ash-hadu 'an laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wa 'ash-hadu 'anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa Rasooluhu.
prayer_22.en: All greetings of humility are for Allah, and all prayers and goodness. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings. Peace be upon us and upon the righteous slaves of Allah. I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship but Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger.

prayer_23.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
prayer_23.tr: Allaahumma salli 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa 'aali Muhammadin, kamaa sallayta 'alaa 'Ibraaheema wa 'alaa 'aali 'Ibraaheema, 'innaka Hameedun Majeed. Allaahumma baarik 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa 'aali Muhammadin, kamaa baarakta 'alaa 'Ibraaheema wa 'alaa 'aali 'Ibraaheema, 'innaka Hameedun Majeed.
prayer_23.en: O Allah, bestow Your favor on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad as You have bestowed Your favor on Ibrahim and on the family of Ibrahim, You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You have blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim, You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious.

prayer_23.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
prayer_23.tr: Allaahumma salli 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa 'azwaajihi wa thurriyyatihi, kamaa sallayta 'alaa 'aali 'Ibraaheema. Wa baarik 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa 'azwaajihi wa thurriyyatihi, kamaa baarakta 'alaa 'aali 'Ibraaheema. 'Innaka Hameedun Majeed.
prayer_23.en: O Allah, bestow Your favor on Muhammad and upon his wives and progeny as You have bestowed Your favor upon the family of Ibrahim. And bless Muhammad and his wives and progeny as You have blessed the family of Ibrahim. You are full of praise, Most Glorious.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَمِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu bika min 'athaabil-qabri, wa min 'athaabi jahannama, wa min fitnatil-mahyaa walmamaati, wa min sharri fitnatil-maseehid-dajjaal.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and from the punishment of Hell-fire, and from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu bika min 'athaabil-qabri, wa 'a'oothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjaali, wa 'a'oothu bika min fitnatil-mahyaa walmamaati. Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu bika minal-ma'thami walmaghrami.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, the trial of the False Messiah, and the trials of life and death. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from sin and from debt.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee dhalamtu nafsee dhulman katheeran, wa laa yaghfiruth-thunooba 'illaa 'Anta, faghfir lee maghfiratan min 'indika warhamnee 'innaka 'Antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I have greatly wronged myself and no one forgives sins but You. So, grant me forgiveness and have mercy on me. Surely, you are Forgiving, Merciful.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَفْتُ وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ وَأَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahum-maghfir lee maa qaddamtu, wa maa 'akhkhartu, wa maa 'asrartu, wa maa 'a'lantu, wa maa 'asraftu, wa maa 'Anta 'a'lamu bihi minnee. 'Antal-Muqaddimu, wa 'Antal-Mu'akhkhiru laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, forgive me what I have sent before me and what I have left behind, what I have concealed and what I have done openly, what I have done in excess, and what You are better aware of than I. You are the One Who sends forth and the One Who delays. There is none worthy of worship but You.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'a'innee 'alaa thikrika, wa shukrika, wa husni 'ibaadatika.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, help me to remember You, to give You thanks, and to perform Your worship in the best manner.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu bika minal-bukhli, wa 'a'oothu bika minal-jubni, wa 'a'oothu bika min 'an 'uradda 'ilaa 'arthalil-'umuri, wa 'a'oothu bika min fitnatid-dunyaa wa 'athaabil-qabri.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection from miserliness, from cowardice, from being returned to feeble old age, from the trials of this world and from the torment of the grave.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and seek Your protection from the Fire.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الْغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ أَحْيِنِي مَا عَلِمْتَ الْحَيَاةَ خَيْرًا لِي وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا عَلِمْتَ الْوَفَاةَ خَيْرًا لِي
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma bi'ilmikal-ghayba wa qudratika 'alal-khalqi 'ahyinee maa 'alimtal-hayaata khayran lee wa tawaffanee 'ithaa 'alimtal-wafaata khayran lee.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, by Your Knowledge of the unseen and by Your Power over creation, let me live if You know that life is good for me, and let me die if You know that death is good for me. O Allah, I ask You for fear of You, the word of truth, moderation, unceasing blessings, the joy of gazing upon Your Face, and the joy of meeting You without harm or trials.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ بِأَنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'as'aluka yaaAllaahu bi'annakal-Waahidul-'Ahadus-Samadul-lathee, lam yalid wa lam yoolad, wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan 'Ahad, 'an taghfira lee thunoobee 'innaka 'Antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I ask You — O Allah, You are the One, the Only, Self-Sufficient Master, Who was not begotten and begets not and none is equal to Him — to forgive me my sins. Surely you are Forgiving, Merciful.

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ الْمَنَّانُ يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'as'aluka bi'anna lakal-hamda laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Anta wahdaka laa shareeka laka, Al-Mannaanu, yaa Badee'as-samaawaati wal'ardhi yaa Thal-Jalaali wal-'Ikraam, yaa Hayyu yaa Qayyoomu 'innee 'as'alukal-jannata wa 'a'oothu bika minan-naar.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I ask You, as You are the Owner of praise, there is none worthy of worship but You alone, You have no partner. You are the Giver of all good. O Creator of the heavens and the earth, Owner of majesty and honor. O Living and Everlasting One, I ask You for Paradise and I seek refuge in You from the Fire.
prayer_24.src: Abu Dawud, An-Nasa'i, Ibn Majah, At-Tirmizi, Sahih Ibn Majah 2/329

prayer_24.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
prayer_24.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'as'aluka bi'annee 'ash-hadu 'annaka 'Antallaahu laa 'ilaaha 'illaa 'Antal-'Ahadus-Samadul-lathee lam yalid wa lam yoolad wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan 'Ahad.
prayer_24.en: O Allah, I ask You, by the fact that I bear witness that You are Allah. There is none worthy of worship but You, the Only God, Self-Sufficient, Who was not begotten and begets not, and none is equal to Him.

prayer_25.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ — اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
prayer_25.tr: 'Astaghfirullaaha (three times). Allaahumma 'Antas-Salaamu wa minkas-salaamu, tabaarakta yaa Thal-Jalaali wal-'Ikraam.
prayer_25.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah. (Three times.) O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Owner of majesty and honor.

prayer_25.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ اللَّهُمَّ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَلَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَلَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ
prayer_25.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer. Allaahumma laa maani'a limaa 'a'tayta, wa laa mu'tiya limaa mana'ta, wa laa yanfa'u thal-jaddi minkal-jadd.
prayer_25.en: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise and He is Able to do all things. O Allah, there is none who can withhold what You give, and none may give what You have withheld; and the might of the mighty person cannot benefit him against You.

prayer_25.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ لَا نَعْبُدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ
prayer_25.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku, wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer. Laa hawla wa laa quwwata 'illaa billaahi, laa na'budu 'illaa 'iyyaahu, lahun-ni'matu wa lahul-fadhlu wa lahuth-thanaa'ul-hasanu, laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu mukhliseena lahud-deena wa law karihal-kaafiroon.
prayer_25.en: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise and He is Able to do all things. There is no power and no might except by Allah. We do not worship any other besides Him. His is grace, and His is bounty and to Him belongs the most excellent praise. None has the right to be worshiped but Allah — sincere in making our devotion to Him, even though the disbelievers may dislike it.

prayer_25.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (٣٣) — لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
prayer_25.tr: Subhaanallaahi, walhamdu lillaahi wallaahu 'Akbar (33 times each). Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer.
prayer_25.en: Glory is to Allah, praise is to Allah, and Allah is the Most Great — thirty-three times each. Then: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone. He has no partner, His is the dominion and His is the praise and He is Able to do all things. (Whoever says this after every prayer will be forgiven his sins even though they be as the foam of the sea.)

prayer_25.ar: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ — قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ — قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
prayer_25.tr: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas (Qul huwal-laahu ahad...), Al-Falaq (Qul a'oothu bi-rabbil-falaq...), and An-Nas (Qul a'oothu bi-rabbin-naas...).
prayer_25.en: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq and An-Nas. (After each prayer; three times after Fajr and Maghrib.)

prayer_25.ar: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَلَا يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
prayer_25.tr: Allaahu laa 'ilaaha 'illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom, laa ta'khuthuhu sinatun wa laa nawm, lahu maa fis-samaawaati wa maafil-'ardh, man thal-lathee yashfa'u 'indahu 'illaa bi'ithnih, wasi'a kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal'ardh, wa laa ya'ooduhu hifdhuhumaa, wa Huwal-'Aliyyul-'Adheem.
prayer_25.en: Ayat al-Kursi — Allah, there is none worthy of worship but He, the Ever Living, the One Who sustains and protects all that exists. Neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who can intercede with Him except with His Permission? His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and He feels no fatigue in guarding and preserving them. And He is the Most High, the Most Great. (After every obligatory prayer.)

prayer_25.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
prayer_25.tr: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu yuhyee wa yumeetu wa Huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in Qadeer.
prayer_25.en: None has the right to be worshiped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise. He brings life and He causes death, and He is Able to do all things. (Ten times after Maghrib and Fajr prayers.)

prayer_25.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
prayer_25.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'as'aluka 'ilman naafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan.
prayer_25.en: O Allah, I ask You for knowledge that is of benefit, a good provision, and deeds that will be accepted. (Recite after Fajr prayer.)

prayer_32.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ إِنَّهُ لَا يَذِلُّ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ وَلَا يَعِزُّ مَنْ عَادَيْتَ تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَتَعَالَيْتَ
prayer_32.tr: Allaahum-mahdinee feeman hadayta, wa 'aafinee feeman 'aafayta, wa tawallanee feeman tawallayta, wa baarik lee feemaa 'a'atayta, wa qinee sharra maa qadhayta, 'innahu laa yathillu man waalayta, wa laa ya'izzu man 'aadayta, tabaarakta Rabbanaa wa ta'aalayta.
prayer_32.en: O Allah, guide me with those whom You have guided, and strengthen me with those whom You have given strength. Take me to Your care with those whom You have taken to Your care. Bless me in what You have given me. Protect me from the evil You have ordained. None whom You have committed to Your care shall be humiliated. Blessed are You, Our Lord, and Exalted.
prayer_32.src: Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, An-Nasa'i, At-Tirmizi, Ahmad, Al-Hakim

prayer_32.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ لَا أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ
prayer_32.tr: Allaahumma 'innee 'a'oothu biridhaaka min sakhatika, wa bimu'aafaatika min 'uqoobatika, wa 'a'oothu bika minka, laa 'uhsee thanaa'an 'alayka, 'Anta kamaa 'athnayta 'alaa nafsika.
prayer_32.en: O Allah, I seek refuge with Your Pleasure from Your anger. I seek refuge in Your forgiveness from Your punishment. I seek refuge in You from You. I cannot count Your praises, You are as You have praised Yourself.
prayer_32.src: Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, An-Nasa'i, At-Tirmizi, Ahmad

prayer_32.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَلَكَ نُصَلِّي وَنَسْجُدُ وَإِلَيْكَ نَسْعَى وَنَحْفِدُ نَرْجُو رَحْمَتَكَ وَنَخْشَى عَذَابَكَ
prayer_32.tr: Allaahumma 'iyyaaka na'budu, wa laka nusallee wa nasjudu, wa 'ilayka nas'aa wa nahfidu, narjoo rahmataka, wa nakhshaa 'athaabaka, 'inna 'athaabaka bilkaafireena mulhiq.
prayer_32.en: O Allah, You alone do we worship and to You we pray and bow down prostrate. To You we hasten to worship and to serve. Our hope is for Your mercy and we fear Your punishment. Surely, Your punishment of the disbelievers is at hand.

prayer_33.ar: سُبْحَانَ الْمَلِكِ الْقُدُّوسِ — رَبُّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ
prayer_33.tr: Subhaanal-Malikil-Quddoosi. (Three times, raising the voice on the third.) Rabbil-malaa'ikati warrooh.
prayer_33.en: Glory is to the King, the Holy. (Say three times, raising and extending the voice on the third time, then say:) Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

prayer_42.en: I seek refuge in Allah from Satan the outcast. (Then spit gently to your left three times.) If afflicted by whispering during prayer or recitation, spit gently to your left three times and seek refuge in Allah from Satan. This will drive away what you are experiencing.
